item.village-quest.kupfer_groschen.lore: Leftover from the old mint. Not part of the current purse.
item.village-quest.eisen_groschen.lore: Silvermark: The common coin of the road.
item.village-quest.magic_shard.lore: 1 shard for an extra daily. 10 shards for a hidden trial.
item.village-quest.starreach_ring.lore: Carry in your offhand to place and reach blocks 2 steps farther away.
item.village-quest.merchant_seal.lore: Sneak-use on a pilgrim or wandering trader once per day to refresh that merchant's wares.
item.village-quest.shepherd_flute.lore: Its call draws nearby animals toward you for a short while.
item.village-quest.starreach_map.lore: A red X marks the buried cache that guards the ring.
text.village-quest.daily.shard.title: The Questmaster's Call
text.village-quest.daily.shard.body.1: Today's duty is done. Yet with old magic I could still reveal one more task for this day.
text.village-quest.daily.shard.body.2: If you entrust me with a Magic Shard, I will uncover an extra quest. The shard will be consumed.
text.village-quest.daily.shard.accept: 1. I will use a Magic Shard
text.village-quest.special.offer.accept: 1. I will bind the ten shards
message.village-quest.questmaster.comple: You already completed this quest today. Come back tomorrow!
You already fulfilled even the extra task today. Come back tomorrow!
message.village-quest.questmaster.busy: The Questmaster is already speaking with someone else.
message.village-quest.questmaster.too_fa: You are too far away from the Questmaster.
message.village-quest.questmaster.shard_: You no longer have a Magic Shard with you.
The Questmaster could not find another fitting task.
message.village-quest.questmaster.specia: You no longer carry the ten Magic Shards needed for this hidden trial.
The shards hum in unison. Return to the Questmaster and claim the hidden map.
The Questmaster could not bind a hidden cache for you yet. Try again in a moment.
The buried cache does not answer your hand.
Do not break the cache itself. Unearth it and open it instead.
command.village-quest.questadmin.player_: A player is required for this command.
The Questmaster could not find a place to appear.
command.village-quest.questadmin.resetda: Your daily quest status for today has been reset.
Daily quest status for %s has been reset.
An admin reset your daily quest status for today.
command.village-quest.questadmin.nextdai: Next daily test prepared. Previous quest: %s
Next daily test prepared for %s. Previous quest: %s
An admin prepared your daily status for a next-day test.
command.village-quest.questadmin.complet: There is no active daily quest to complete immediately.
Active daily quest for %s completed immediately: %s
An admin completed your active daily quest immediately: %s
command.village-quest.questadmin.shardca: Your hidden shard quest was moved directly to the map and cache phase.
The hidden shard quest of %s was moved directly to the map and cache phase.
Your hidden shard quest was moved directly to the map and cache phase by an admin.
The map and cache phase of the hidden shard quest could not be prepared right now.
You were teleported directly to the buried shard cache.
%s was teleported directly to the buried shard cache.
An admin teleported you directly to the buried shard cache.
The buried shard cache could not be resolved or found right now.
command.village-quest.questadmin.dailypr: %s has no active daily quest today.
command.village-quest.questadmin.showdai: Today's daily offer cannot be shown again because the quest is already active.
Today's daily offer cannot be shown again because the quest is already completed today.
Today's daily offer could not be shown.
Today's daily offer shown again for %s: %s
An admin showed today's daily offer to you again: %s
command.village-quest.generic.not_allowe: You can't do that right now.
command.village-quest.wallet.convert.non: No legacy coin items were found in your inventory.
An admin adjusted your wallet: %s. New balance: %s
An admin set your wallet to: %s
command.village-quest.shop.offer_missing: That shop offer does not exist.
quest.village-quest.daily.honey.title: The Queen's Gift
quest.village-quest.daily.honey.offer.1:
This year's bloom was so rich that my hives are overflowing - honey is already dripping from the combs!
If nobody helps soon, the bees will run out of room and leave.
quest.village-quest.daily.honey.offer.2:
I'm looking for someone to help harvest the honey and cut the combs,
before the whole yard turns sticky like a sweet shop.
A small purse and honest thanks shall be your pay.
quest.village-quest.daily.honey.completi: The yard smells like summer again, and the bees dance as if it had never been any other way.
You saved more than you know - thank you, friend.
I'm happy to share a few coins and a bit of experience with you.
quest.village-quest.daily.pet_collar.off: Does your dog or cat wear a collar as faded as an old market stall in the rain?
Take up dye and skill, and give your companion the adornment it deserves!
quest.village-quest.daily.pet_collar.com: The color shines, and your faithful companion wears it with pride.
Such care travels fast - thank you for your effort.
Here are a few coins in thanks for your handiwork.
quest.village-quest.daily.wheat.title: Bakehouse Help
quest.village-quest.daily.wheat.offer.1: The bakehouse is short on both grain and finished loaves, and morning will come fast.
quest.village-quest.daily.wheat.offer.2: Harvest 12 ripe wheat crops and craft 3 loaves of bread yourself so the ovens are not heated for nothing.
quest.village-quest.daily.wheat.completi: The sacks are filled, and the smell of fresh bread finally returns to the bakehouse.
A village eats well when someone sees the work through from field to oven.
Take a few coins in thanks for your effort.
quest.village-quest.daily.potato.title: Kitchen Supplies
quest.village-quest.daily.potato.offer.1: The kitchen does not need just one full basket - it needs the right mix to keep supper going.
quest.village-quest.daily.potato.offer.2: Harvest 10 ripe potato plants and 10 ripe carrot plants so the pots do not go empty tonight.
quest.village-quest.daily.potato.complet: The pantry baskets are balanced again, and the kitchen can finally work properly.
Anyone who keeps both fields moving saves a village from many thin meals.
Here, take some coins for the road.
quest.village-quest.daily.wood.title: Fuel for the Workshop
quest.village-quest.daily.wood.offer.1: The workshop is short at both ends: timber above ground, fuel below it.
quest.village-quest.daily.wood.offer.2: Chop 8 logs and mine 8 coal ore blocks so the bench and furnace can work together again.
quest.village-quest.daily.wood.completio: The woodpile is stacked, the fuel is ready, and the workshop has found its rhythm again.
Good work rarely fixes only one side of the problem - you supplied both.
Take these coins as payment for the way back.
quest.village-quest.daily.coal.title: A Favor for the Smithy
quest.village-quest.daily.coal.offer.1: The smithy needs ore for metal and coal for heat - one without the other is only half a day's work.
quest.village-quest.daily.coal.offer.2: Mine 6 iron ore blocks and 8 coal ore blocks so the hammer and furnace do not fall silent today.
quest.village-quest.daily.coal.completio: The furnace is glowing, the ore is ready, and honest work rings through the smithy again.
Anyone who brings both fire and metal helps more than words ever could.
Take these coins as your pay.
quest.village-quest.daily.wool.title: Wool for the Weaver
quest.village-quest.daily.wool.offer.1: The weaver has empty hands again: no fresh cut from the pasture, no wool for the loom.
quest.village-quest.daily.wool.offer.2: Shear 3 sheep and pick up 6 wool yourself so thread can become cloth again.
quest.village-quest.daily.wool.completio: The wool bundles are stacked, and the loom can finally start moving again.
Careful work out on the pasture saves twice the labor at the frame.
Here are coins in thanks for your trouble.
quest.village-quest.daily.river.title: Meal from the River
quest.village-quest.daily.river.offer.1: The river is full of good catch today, but without steady hands the pan will stay cold.
quest.village-quest.daily.river.offer.2: Catch 3 fish and cook 3 of them yourself so a proper fresh meal can make it onto the table.
quest.village-quest.daily.river.completi: The catch is in, and the smell of a proper riverside meal finally drifts from the kitchen.
Anyone who catches and cooks the meal themselves brings home more than food alone.
Take a few coins for your work.
quest.village-quest.daily.autumn.title: Autumn Harvest
quest.village-quest.daily.autumn.offer.1: The heavy autumn fruits are ready in the fields, but nobody has enough time to clear both rows before they spoil.
quest.village-quest.daily.autumn.offer.2: Harvest 6 pumpkins and 6 melons straight from the fields before a good harvest is left lying there.
quest.village-quest.daily.autumn.complet: The fruit is gathered in, and the pantry finally looks like a proper autumn storehouse again.
You did not merely collect produce - you saved the harvest at the right time.
Here are coins for you and your timely help.
quest.village-quest.daily.smelt.title: Smelting for the Smithy
quest.village-quest.daily.smelt.offer.1: The smithy is not short on will, only on properly mined ore and iron that has actually been smelted through.
quest.village-quest.daily.smelt.offer.2: Mine 8 iron ore blocks yourself and smelt 8 iron ingots from them so hammer and anvil can work again.
quest.village-quest.daily.smelt.completi: The ore is mined, the ingots are stacked, and proper work rings through the smithy again.
Anyone who does not stop at mining but finishes the metal lifts the burden from an entire workshop.
Take coins as a sign of thanks for your effort.
quest.village-quest.daily.stall.title: New Life in the Stable
quest.village-quest.daily.stall.offer.1: The stable has gone too quiet, and without new stock even the best feed is only half-used labor.
quest.village-quest.daily.stall.offer.2: Put 2 animals into breeding mode with real breeding food so new life returns to the pens.
quest.village-quest.daily.stall.completi: There is movement in the stable again, and the promise of new life finally hangs over the pens.
Care with livestock always pays twice - today that is easy to see.
Here are coins for your help.
quest.village-quest.daily.trade.title: Business in the Village
quest.village-quest.daily.trade.offer.1: Market day never truly starts if nobody trades with the villagers and gets the goods moving again.
quest.village-quest.daily.trade.offer.2: Complete 2 real villager trades and earn at least 1 emerald in the process so village business comes back to life.
quest.village-quest.daily.trade.completi: The trade crates are changing hands again, and the village market finally feels alive.
Anyone who reconnects supply and demand helps a village more than a single full sack ever could.
Take coins for your good business.
quest.village-quest.special.shards.title: Whispers of the Shards
quest.village-quest.special.shards.offer: Ten Magic Shards answer one another in your pack. If you trust them to me, I can bind their old voices into a hidden trial of magic.
Bring me 4 Amethyst Clusters, brew 3 potions, enchant 1 item, obtain 1 Ender Pearl, and obtain 1 Blaze Rod. The %s shards will be consumed.
quest.village-quest.special.shards.cache: The map's red X points toward a buried cache in the Overworld.
Dig beneath the marked ground and recover the Starreach Ring.
quest.village-quest.special.shards.map_g: Your proof is complete. I have drawn the hidden cache onto this map.
Follow the red X, dig below the marked earth, and claim the Starreach Ring for yourself.
quest.village-quest.special.shards.map_r: I have marked the hidden cache for you again. Trust the red X and dig where the earth sounds hollow.
quest.village-quest.special.shards.compl: The Starreach Ring answers your hand at last, and the old shard-song falls quiet.
Wear it in your offhand and the world itself yields two more steps to your reach.
quest.village-quest.special.merchant.off: Your name is spoken well on the market road. If you wish, I can put that standing to the proof and bind a seal fit for a true traveling broker.
Complete 5 villager trades, earn 8 emeralds from those deals, and make 1 purchase from a pilgrim stall. Do this, and the seal is yours.
quest.village-quest.special.merchant.com: The Merchant's Seal now rests in your hand, and every road-side stall should honor your standing.
Sneak-use it on a pilgrim or wandering trader once per day to refresh that merchant's wares.
quest.village-quest.special.flute.title: Shepherd's Flute
The herds know calm hands, and the village has taken notice. If you would prove that gift, I can name you to an old pastoral trial.
Breed 4 animals, shear 3 sheep, and gather 8 wool. Return when the pens are lively again, and the flute will be yours.
quest.village-quest.special.flute.comple: The Shepherd's Flute now answers your breath, and even skittish creatures listen to its call.
Play it to draw nearby animals close for a short while.
screen.village-quest.journal.title: Journal
screen.village-quest.journal.summary.sto: Every deed in this village is recorded in its archives. Whoever crosses the paths of its people writes themselves into the chronicle. This journal bears witness to you.
screen.village-quest.journal.commands.in: These pages list the commands that are actually useful for normal players during everyday quest play.
screen.village-quest.journal.commands.av: All commands shown here are player-safe. No admin permissions are needed.
screen.village-quest.journal.commands.qu: Call the Questmaster near you to offer or review quests.
screen.village-quest.journal.commands.wa: Show your current digital wallet balance.
screen.village-quest.journal.commands.re: Show your current standing in farming, crafting, animals, village trade, and monster hunting.
screen.village-quest.journal.commands.jo: Open or close this journal at any time.
screen.village-quest.journal.commands.qu: These commands matter once a quest offer or tracked quest is already in play.
screen.village-quest.journal.commands.ac: Accept the quest offer currently shown by the Questmaster.
screen.village-quest.journal.commands.qu: Toggle the permanent quest tracker in the top-right corner.
Force the permanent quest tracker to stay visible.
Hide the permanent quest tracker again.
screen.village-quest.journal.flow.1: Use /questmaster to call the Questmaster to your location.
screen.village-quest.journal.flow.2: Review the offer in the Questmaster board and accept it there, or use /dailyquest accept while a chat offer is open.
screen.village-quest.journal.flow.3: While a quest is active, progress now appears directly in the action bar. You can also enable the permanent tracker.
screen.village-quest.journal.flow.4: Normal daily quests reset after midnight. Magic Shards can unlock one extra daily and, in greater number, a hidden trial.
screen.village-quest.journal.flow.5: You can review active quest progress here at any time and cancel the current daily with the red X.
The village remembers every steady hand. Each completed task strengthens your standing with the people who live and work here.
screen.village-quest.journal.relics.head: Relics
screen.village-quest.journal.relics.stor: These special items are only listed here while you are actually carrying them.
screen.village-quest.journal.relics.surv: Sneak-right-click to change the target. Then right-click normally to use the current mode: in Home mode it returns you home about every 30 minutes, while other modes bind it to a nearby biome or structure.
screen.village-quest.journal.help.1: There are daily quests that can be completed anew each day.
screen.village-quest.journal.help.2: The daily reset happens after midnight.
screen.village-quest.journal.help.3: You can click the chat message to accept a quest.
screen.village-quest.journal.help.4: In the journal you can manage quests, check progress, and cancel them.
text.village-quest.shop.title: Village Shop
text.village-quest.shop.coming_soon: No merchant is carrying wares right now. Try again later.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.proviantbe: A simple travel bundle with bread and torches for the next stretch of road.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.hunters_sa: A field satchel stocked with arrows and provisions for the next hunt.
A sweet decorative piece for pantry, counter, or tavern corner.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.bienenwabe: Golden decor for every beekeeper's nook and any cozy home.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.beekeepers: A practical hive set with a campfire and bottles for the next good harvest.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.gemaelde_b: A warm keepsake for a parlor, hallway, or sleeping chamber.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.gemaelde_m: Rare wall decor for those who can afford a truly regal accent.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.gemaelde_p: A reverent wall piece for halls with a taste for strange saints.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.gemaelde_o: A forceful pointing scene for rooms where somebody always knows better.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.gemaelde_g: A gentle classic for quiet corners and good company.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.gemaelde_s: A sideways stare for walls that should look suspicious in return.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.gemaelde_t: A bold portrait for chambers that prefer a confident presence.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.gemaelde_a: A stern face for stone halls, guild rooms, and serious spaces.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.gemaelde_h: A broad cheerful scene for bright rooms, riverbanks, and easy afternoons.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.zombie_tro: A grim keepsake for hunters who want proof on the wall.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.skeleton_t: A stark skull for halls that prefer their warnings literal.
text.village-quest.shop.offer.creeper_tr: A rare blast-marked trophy for a hunter of real nerve.
message.village-quest.pilgrim.arrived: A traveling pilgrim has made camp nearby.
message.village-quest.pilgrim.busy: The pilgrim is already bargaining with someone else.
message.village-quest.pilgrim.too_far: The pilgrim is too far away.
message.village-quest.special.merchant.r: Return to the Questmaster. The Merchant's Seal is ready to be claimed.
message.village-quest.special.merchant.u: The seal has already refreshed a merchant's wares today.
message.village-quest.special.merchant.r: The Merchant's Seal refreshes the merchant's wares.
message.village-quest.special.merchant.t: That merchant is already bargaining with someone else.
message.village-quest.special.flute.read: Return to the Questmaster. The Shepherd's Flute is ready to be claimed.
message.village-quest.special.flute.no_a: No nearby animals answer the flute.
command.village-quest.questadmin.pilgrim: The pilgrim could not be spawned safely.
screen.village-quest.pilgrim.title: Pilgrim Trader
screen.village-quest.pilgrim.wallet_hint: Payment is taken directly from your wallet.
screen.village-quest.pilgrim.close_hint: Press Esc to leave the stall.
screen.village-quest.journal.active.head: Active Quests
screen.village-quest.journal.active.dail: Red X: cancel the current daily quest.
screen.village-quest.journal.active.none: Tip: use /questmaster to request a quest offer.
text.village-quest.special.merchant.offe: 1. I will prove my standing on the road
text.village-quest.special.flute.offer.a: 1. I will take the shepherd's trial
Find a way to the island and bring back my
quest.village-quest.wolkensprung.chest_h: Don't dawdle! Go and bring my
screen.village-quest.questmaster.title: Quest Board
screen.village-quest.questmaster.daily.u: The Questmaster has not prepared a task for today yet.
screen.village-quest.questmaster.daily.c: Today's duty is already done. Perhaps a Magic Shard can pull more from the parchment.
screen.village-quest.questmaster.daily.b: An additional task is waiting for your decision.
Even today's extra task has already been completed.
No weekly assignment is available right now.
This week's assignment is already complete. Return after the weekly reset for a new contract.
A new weekly will appear after the next reset.
screen.village-quest.questmaster.special: You have already earned this relic.
Finish your active daily quest first.
The Questmaster is already guiding another relic quest.
The shard trial is underway. Fulfill the magical objectives and return.
The trial is complete. The Questmaster can now hand you the treasure map.
The ring is not yet recovered. Ask for the treasure map again if you need it.
Magic Shards: %s/%s
Gather %s of %s Magic Shards to begin this hidden trial.
Prove yourself upon the market road and return for your seal.
The market road is complete. Merchant's Seal is waiting for you.
Trade with villagers, earn emeralds, and buy once from a pilgrim.
Village Trade reputation: %s/%s
Aid the herd and gather wool to earn the Shepherd's Flute.
The herd trial is complete. The Shepherd's Flute can now be claimed.
Breed animals, shear sheep, and gather wool.
Animals reputation: %s/%s
Effect: When carried in the offhand it grants +2 block reach while building.
Effect: Rerolls pilgrim or wandering trader wares once per in-game day.
Effect: Calls nearby animals to you for a short while.
command.village-quest.questadmin.resetwe: Your weekly quest state was reset.
Reset the weekly quest state for %s.
Your weekly quest state was reset by an admin.
command.village-quest.questadmin.nextwee: Prepared the next weekly quest. Previous: %s
Prepared the next weekly quest for %s. Previous: %s
An admin prepared your next weekly quest.
command.village-quest.questadmin.complet: No active weekly quest could be completed.
An admin completed your weekly quest: %s
quest.village-quest.weekly.harvest.title: Harvest for the Village
quest.village-quest.weekly.harvest.offer: The village granary should not stand half-empty by week's end.
Bring in grain, roots, and enough bread to show the fields were kind.
quest.village-quest.weekly.harvest.compl: The granary is stocked and the ovens stayed warm all week.
The Questmaster marks your name beside the village stores.
Harvest for the Village is complete.
quest.village-quest.weekly.bakehouse.off: The bakehouse needs more than one rush of flour to feed the village.
Keep bread, pies, and hot potatoes ready for the week ahead.
quest.village-quest.weekly.bakehouse.com: The shelves are full and the bakehouse smells like a feast.
Even the latecomers will find something warm waiting for them.
quest.village-quest.weekly.smith.title: Smith's Week
quest.village-quest.weekly.smith.offer.1: A busy forge needs ore in the yard and ingots on the racks.
quest.village-quest.weekly.smith.offer.2: Mine the metal, fire the furnaces, and keep the smith supplied all week.
quest.village-quest.weekly.smith.complet: The forge roared bright and the smith never ran out of work.
Fresh metal now hangs where empty hooks stood before.
quest.village-quest.weekly.pasture.title: Stall and Pasture
quest.village-quest.weekly.pasture.offer: Healthy herds are the village's quiet wealth.
Breed the animals, shear the flock, and gather enough wool for the week.
quest.village-quest.weekly.pasture.compl: The barns are lively and the wool baskets finally look full.
The Questmaster notes that the herds have been well kept.
quest.village-quest.weekly.market.title: Market Week
A proper market week brings silver, emeralds, and word from the road.
Trade with villagers, earn emeralds, and do business with the pilgrim too.
quest.village-quest.weekly.market.comple: The market square stayed busy and the coin never stopped moving.
Both village stalls and the road merchant profited from your work.
quest.village-quest.weekly.nightwatch.of: The nights have grown restless around the village paths.
Thin the undead before their numbers turn bold.
quest.village-quest.weekly.nightwatch.co: The roads are quieter now and the lanterns burn with less fear.
The Questmaster pays you like someone who guarded more than a gate.
quest.village-quest.weekly.roadwarden.of: Merchants and pilgrims need safer roads than the wild has left them.
Drive back the monsters and deal with the creepers before they ruin the way.
quest.village-quest.weekly.roadwarden.co: The road signs still stand, and the path is safer for every traveler.
The Questmaster records that you kept the route open all week.
item.village-quest.apiarists_smoker.lore: Up to 10 times per day, ready a hive for harvest and calm the nearby bees.
item.village-quest.surveyors_compass.lor: Home every 30 min. Controls: see journal.
text.village-quest.reputation.no_unlocks: No unlocks are tied to this reputation yet.
quest.village-quest.daily.zombie_cull.of: The dead have started wandering too close to the village lanes again.
Cut down 8 zombies before the shambling crowd grows bold enough to press the gates.
quest.village-quest.daily.zombie_cull.co: The moaning has faded from the hedgerows, and the road feels safer again.
A village sleeps easier when someone thins the dead before dusk.
Take your pay for the cull.
quest.village-quest.daily.skeleton_patro: Too many skeletons have been sighted near the fields and watchpaths.
Bring down 6 skeletons so the farmers and guards can move without arrows in their backs.
The paths are quieter now that fewer bows answer the dark.
Anyone who breaks a patrol of bones earns honest gratitude.
Here is your reward for the watch.
quest.village-quest.daily.spider_sweep.o: Fresh webs keep appearing around barns, fences, and the low orchard walls.
Kill 6 spiders before the whole yard turns into a nest of silk and eyes.
quest.village-quest.daily.spider_sweep.c: The webs are breaking, and the yard finally feels clear again.
You spared the villagers another night of creeping shadows.
Take these coins for your trouble.
One careless creeper can ruin more work than a day can rebuild.
Hunt down 4 creepers before they tear open the paths, walls, or storehouses.
The walls still stand, and the village keeps its hard-earned shape for another day.
Stopping a blast before it happens is worth more than patching after.
quest.village-quest.special.apiarist_smo: Our hives are thriving, but good tending needs more than one careful pair of hands.
Harvest 8 honey bottles and 4 honeycomb cuts from full hives, and I will entrust you with my Apiarist's Smoker.
You worked the hives with a patient hand, and the whole apiary settled around you.
Take this smoker. Use it well, and the bees will answer you in kind.
message.village-quest.special.apiarist_s: The smoker has already spent all 10 uses for today.
The smoker readies the hive for harvest, settles the nearby bees, and has %1$s/%2$s uses left today.
The smoker settles the nearby bees and has %1$s/%2$s uses left today.
The apiary work is complete. Return to the Questmaster and claim the smoker.
quest.village-quest.special.surveyor_com: A true wayfinder needs sharp eyes, good ore underfoot, and a route home when the world turns dark.

Mine 16 redstone ore, craft a Netherite Pickaxe after accepting this task, and turn in one plain unenchanted Netherite Pickaxe. In return, you will receive the Wayfinder's Compass and 10 Netherite Ingots.
You have proven both patience underground and the discipline to prepare for the long road back.
Take the Wayfinder's Compass and these Netherite Ingots. Let them carry you far and still bring you home.
text.village-quest.special.surveyor_comp: 1. I will chart my way home
message.village-quest.special.surveyor_c: Bring one plain unenchanted Netherite Pickaxe for the turn-in.
The wayfinding work is complete. Return to the Questmaster with your plain Netherite Pickaxe.
Wayfinder's Compass now points toward %1$s (%2$s blocks).
No home point could be found.
The Wayfinder's Compass needs %s before it can return you home again.
The Wayfinder's Compass returns you home.
screen.village-quest.questmaster.special: Harvest from full hives and return for the smoker.
The hive-work is done. Claim the Apiarist's Smoker.
Requires 200 Farming reputation.
Farming reputation required: %s/%s
Finish the wayfinding work and bring a plain Netherite Pickaxe.
The route home is prepared. Claim the Wayfinder's Compass.
Requires 200 Crafting reputation.
Crafting reputation required: %s/%s
Readies up to 10 hives per day and calms nearby bees.
Home returns you every 30 min; other modes bind to nearby biomes or structures.
